properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12

verse.name: v1
v2
v3
verse.lines: I KNOW it was the Blood, I know it was the Blood, I know it was the Blood for me; One day when I was lost, He died upon the cross, I know it was the Blood for me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I KNOW it was the Blood, I know it was the Blood, I know it was the Blood for me; One day when I was lost, He died upon the cross, I know it was the Blood for me.

verse.name: v5
v6
verse.lines: I KNOW it was the Blood, I know it was the Blood, I know it was the Blood for me; One day when I was lost, He died upon the cross, I know it was the Blood for me.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: ALIVE, alive, alive forever more, My Jesus is alive, alive forever more Alive, alive, alive forever more My Jesus is alive forever more Sing Hallelujah (2x) My Jesus is alive forever more Sing Hallelujah (2x) My Jesus is alive.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: ALIVE, alive, alive forever more, My Jesus is alive, alive forever more Alive, alive, alive forever more My Jesus is alive forever more Sing Hallelujah (2x) My Jesus is alive forever more Sing Hallelujah (2x) My Jesus is alive.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Buhay, buhay, buhay kailan pa man Si Hesus ay buhay, buhay kailan pa man Buhay, buhay, buhay kailan pa man Si Hesus ay buhay kailan pa man Awitin natin ang Aleluya, Si Hesus ay buhay kailan pa man Awitin natin ang Aleluya, Si Hesus ay buhay.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Buhay, buhay, buhay kailan pa man Si Hesus ay buhay, buhay kailan pa man Buhay, buhay, buhay kailan pa man Si Hesus ay buhay kailan pa man Awitin natin ang Aleluya, Si Hesus ay buhay kailan pa man Awitin natin ang Aleluya, Si Hesus ay buhay.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Mabilay, mabilay, mabilay ya angga-angga Si Hesus ya mabilay, mabilay ya angga-angga Mabilay, mabilay, mabilay ya angga-angga Si Hesus ya mabilay ya angga-angga Kansyunen ta'yo so Aleluya, Si Hesus ya mabilay ya angga-angga Kansyunen ta'yo so Aleluya, Si Hesus ya mabilay.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Mabilay, mabilay, mabilay ya angga-angga Si Hesus ya mabilay, mabilay ya angga-angga Mabilay, mabilay, mabilay ya angga-angga Si Hesus ya mabilay ya angga-angga Kansyunen ta'yo so Aleluya, Si Hesus ya mabilay ya angga-angga Kansyunen ta'yo so Aleluya, Si Hesus ya mabilay.
